---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2021 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  Turkish Aerospace, Candidate Engineer, Ongoing

2.  Megart Technology, Candidate Engineer, 2024-2025

## Internships

1.  Sirena Marine , Composite Production Intern , 2025

2.  Forvia Faurecia , Lean Manufacturing Intern , 2023

# Projects

# Competencies

-   Programming Languages: Python , R , SQL , PowerBI

-   Quarto, Github

-   Ms Office Programs

-   Microsoft Excel

-   Power Automate

# Hobbies

-   GYM

-   Running

-   Table Tennis

    # FOR MY CV;

    Here is the link! : [Mert_Efe_Zeybek_CV](Mert_Efe_Zeybek_CV.pdf)
